🪶 | ❝The Reaper's daughter doesn't match what one might expect❞

‎

As a dark angel, you weren't sent on another mission for God; at first, you thought it'd be simple like the others. Though now, you're faced upon the Grim reaper's daughter, and, well.... she didn't fit the picture of “Grim Reaper.”
